name: Hello World
author: lihua179
description: 一个简单的 Hello World 演示插件，展示基础的 Web UI 交互。

name: Email Assistant
description: General-purpose IMAP/SMTP email plugin. Receives mail via IMAP IDLE, sends via SMTP SSL. Use node_scope=single to avoid duplicate listeners.
author: lihua179

name: Node Probe
description: Per-node HTTP probe service. Starts a /status + /metrics endpoint on each node. Install once, deploy everywhere — perfect for verifying multi-node plugin delivery.
author: lihua179
